title: The God of All Things: Krishna’s True Form #mahabharata #mythology #comic #shorts
description: On the brink of the world's greatest war, Arjuna froze. To wake him, Krishna revealed a secret that changed the universe forever. #Krishna #BhagavadGita #Vishwaroop #Lore #GraphicNovel

scenes.narration: In the middle of two massive armies, the greatest archer in the world suddenly dropped his bow.
scenes.image_prompt: Arjuna, a legendary Indian archer, kneeling in despair on a golden chariot, his bow Gandiva lying on the floor, two massive ancient armies facing each other in the background, dark fantasy graphic novel style, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Arjuna could not fight his own kin. He turned to his charioteer, Krishna, and begged for a way out.
scenes.image_prompt: Close up of Arjuna’s tearful eyes looking at Krishna, who is holding the reins of four white horses, traditional Indian comic book art, heavy ink shadows, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Krishna smiled and began to speak the words that would become the Bhagavad Gita. But Arjuna needed proof.
scenes.image_prompt: Krishna standing on the chariot, a divine aura beginning to glow around his head, stylized Sanskrit verses floating in the air like smoke, graphic novel illustration, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: 'Show me your true form,' Arjuna whispered. And in that moment, the sky itself began to tear open.
scenes.image_prompt: The sky cracking like glass, revealing a swirling cosmic vortex of stars and energy, dramatic and epic comic panel, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Krishna transformed into the Vishwaroop—a colossal entity with thousands of faces, arms, and eyes.
scenes.image_prompt: A titanic, multi-faced divine being spanning from earth to the heavens, glowing with the light of a thousand suns, traditional Indian mythological features in a modern comic style, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Arjuna saw the entire universe inside this one being: the birth of stars and the death of time itself.
scenes.image_prompt: A view inside the divine body of Krishna showing galaxies, planets, and ancient gods all moving in a cycle, cosmic horror meets divine beauty, graphic novel style, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He saw the warriors of the battlefield being swallowed by the flaming mouths of time.
scenes.image_prompt: Menacing fiery mouths of the cosmic form devouring shadowy silhouettes of soldiers, dark and gritty comic aesthetic, red and gold color palette, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Trembling, Arjuna realized that the war had already been won in the spiritual realm. He was merely an instrument.
scenes.image_prompt: Arjuna shielding his eyes from the blinding divine light, looking tiny and humbled before the god, heavy textured lines, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The archer stood up, picked up his bow, and prepared for a battle that would echo through eternity.
scenes.image_prompt: Arjuna standing tall on his chariot, bow in hand, a fierce and divine fire in his eyes, final epic comic panel, fade to black, vertical 1080x1920
